seoTitle: Pine Camp vs Pine Clump — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pine Camp and Pine Clump. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pine Camp vs Pine Clump: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pine Camp and Pine Clump.
heading: Pine Camp vs Pine Clump — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pine Camp, New South Wales and Pine Clump, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pine Clump has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Pine Camp (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pine Camp or Pine Clump safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pine Camp has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Pine Clump scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pine Camp scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Pine Clump scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pine Camp or Pine Clump?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pine Clump has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
